title: ONIK Images Image Settings Schema
description: Schema for configuring CSS selector to image processing parameters mapping

widths.description: Array of image widths in pixels to generate. Optional - if not provided, the width will be extracted from the image element's width attribute.

loading.description: Image loading attribute value. 'lazy' for lazy loading, 'eager' for immediate loading, empty string for browser default

sizes.description: CSS sizes attribute value for responsive images

lazyLoadAfter.description: Number of images to process before enabling lazy loading. Only applies when loading is set to 'lazy'

fetchpriority.description: Image fetchpriority attribute value. 'high' for high priority, 'low' for low priority, 'auto' for browser default, empty string for no attribute

decoding.description: Image decoding attribute value. 'sync' for synchronous decoding, 'async' for asynchronous decoding, 'auto' for browser default, empty string for no attribute

format.description: Image format to use. 'auto' for automatic format selection, or specific format like 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'avif', 'webp'. Empty string for no format specification.

srcSwap.description: Controls which image attributes to swap. 'srcSet' for responsive images with srcset attribute, 'src' for single image with src attribute, 'srcAndSrcSet' for both attributes, 'InlineStyleUrl' for inline CSS background-image URLs

setWidth.description: Fixed width attribute to add to the image tag. Must be a positive integer or null for no width attribute

setHeight.description: Fixed height attribute to add to the image tag. Must be a positive integer or null for no height attribute

picture.description: When true, replaces the img tag with a picture element containing source tags for better image rendering control. When false, uses the existing img swapping behavior.
